response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; they lack clear evidence of React or Nest.js usage in recent roles, have no demonstrated PostgreSQL or renewable energy domain experience, and show minimal German proficiency despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js across multiple domains
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking (e.g., GISCollective, Kubernetes deployment)
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and deliver complex systems
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role with 10+ years of senior experience
No clear evidence of React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL in recent work
Basic German language skills conflict with high on-site presence requirement
